nasb.text: Then as for the prophet or the priest or the people who say, ‘The oracle of the Lord,’ I will bring punishment upon that man and his household.

esv.text: And as for the prophet, priest, or one of the people who says, ‘The burden of the Lord,’ I will punish that man and his household.

cnv.text: “無論是先知、是祭司，或是人民，凡說‘這是耶和華的默示’的，我都要懲罰那人和他的家。”

ccb.text: 如果有先知、祭司或百姓宣称有耶和华的启示，我必惩罚他和他全家。
